content.problemStatement:
Merge sort  (5 Marks)You are given an array of N integers. Your task is to sort the array in ascending order using the Merge Sort algorithm.

Merge Sort is a divide and conquer algorithm that:

Divides the array into two halves

Recursively sorts both halves

Merges the sorted halves

You must implement Merge Sort to solve this problem.


Input Format
The first line contains an integer N — the number of elements in the array.


The second line contains N space-separated integers representing the array elemen



Output Format
Print the sorted array in ascending order.


Output should contain N space-separated integers.
